name: TOXIC MEGACOLON
definition: acute transmural fulminant colitis characterized by neurogenic loss of motor tone + rapid
dominant_finding: distended colon filled with large amounts of fluid + air
discriminating_features: colonic ileus with marked dilatation of transverse colon > 5.5-6.0 cm ← gas influx into
increasing caliber of colon on serial radiographs without redundancy
loss of normal colonic haustra + interhaustral folds

general: colonic ileus with marked dilatation of transverse colon > 5.5-6.0 cm ← gas influx into
increasing caliber of colon on serial radiographs without redundancy
loss of normal colonic haustra + interhaustral folds
pseudopolyposis = mucosal islands in denuded ulcerated colonic wall
US: marked decrease in colonic wall thickness to < 2 mm
CT: distended colon filled with large amounts of fluid + air
irregular nodular contour of thinned wall
intramural air / small collections (= pneumatosis coli)
